title: Life Begins
description: First signs of life on Earth.

title: First Oceans
description: Earth's surface cools enough for liquid water to pool.

title: Great Oxidation Event
description: Cyanobacteria produce oxygen, reshaping Earth's atmosphere.

title: Eukaryotes Appear
description: Complex cells with nuclei emerge, enabling multicellular life.

title: Cambrian Explosion
description: Rapid diversification of complex animal life forms.

title: Plants Colonize Land
description: Plants make the leap from water to solid ground.

title: First Mammals
description: Mammal ancestors emerge in the shadow of dinosaurs.

title: Birds Evolve
description: Dinosaurs evolve into birds — the only surviving dinosaur lineage.

title: Himalayas Rise
description: India collides with Asia, building the world's tallest mountains.
